body:
This commit adds a new test in the restart file that uses a yml file as a base for a test. The job was picked to be a target job, but with reduced t_end (`amip_target_diagedmf.ylm`).

I would like to run everything together, but compilation time is too long. I changed the test to take a command-line argument to choose between running one comprehensive test (default) or many tests and added both on buildkite.

In working on this, I found a problem with our macOS runner (it is running in emulated mode, making it much slower). This PR includes a commit to fix that. I also removed some unused dependencies from the test environment.

I also found the issue with radiation allskywithclear, so I think that #3330 can be closed

What's left is mainly MPI

Closes #3330
title: Add target job to restart test
